summary: Rasterize a rotated ellipse into a coverage Mask with an analytic soft-edge feather (smoothstep, half_width_px) evaluated from the implicit quadratic.

inputs.name: extent_from
inputs.doc: The resource whose pixel extent the produced mask matches.

params.name: center_px
params.doc: The ellipse center [x, y] in pixel coordinates.

params.name: radii_px
params.doc: The semi-axis radii [rx, ry] in pixels; both strictly positive.

params.name: angle_rad
params.doc: Counter-clockwise rotation of the ellipse, in radians.

params.name: antialias
params.doc: The antialias mode; only analytic coverage is supported.

params.name: edge
params.doc: Optional soft edge { profile: smoothstep, half_width_px: N } feathering the boundary by N physical pixels; absent is a hard edge.

perceptual.reason: mask.ellipse produces analytic geometric coverage verified by analytic area convergence, rotation/translation covariance, and a measured feather width; there is no perceptual-quality metric to apply
